# terrible_community_general_taiga_issue (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `issue_type` (String) The issue type. Must exist previously.
- `project` (String) Name of the project containing the issue. Must exist previously.
- `subject` (String) The issue subject.

### Optional

- `attachment` (String) Path to a file to be attached to the issue.
- `attachment_description` (String) A string describing the file to be attached to the issue.
- `description` (String) The issue description.
- `priority` (String) The issue priority. Must exist previously.
- `severity` (String) The issue severity. Must exist previously.
- `state` (String) Whether the issue should be present or not.
- `status` (String) The issue status. Must exist previously.
- `tags` (String) A lists of tags to be assigned to the issue.
- `taiga_host` (String) The hostname of the Taiga instance.
